info.name: StartPitch API
info.description:
Flask backend API for StartPitch — auth, startups, pitches, AI evaluations, investor matching, mentor bookings, deal rooms, messaging, notifications and admin.

How to run this collection end-to-end:
1. Run every request in **Auth** top to bottom first (Register Founder/Investor/Admin, then Login (Founder) and Login (Admin)). This populates {{access_token}}, {{admin_access_token}}, {{user_id}}, {{investor_user_id}} and {{admin_user_id}} collection variables automatically via each request's Tests script.
2. All other requests (except Admin folder) use {{access_token}} automatically via collection-level Bearer auth.
3. The Admin folder uses {{admin_access_token}} automatically via folder-level auth.
4. Create-type requests (Create Startup, Create Pitch, Add Pitch Version, Queue Evaluation, Recompute Matches, Create Booking, Create Deal Room, Add Document) save their new resource id into the matching collection variable, so downstream requests that reference {{startup_id}}, {{pitch_id}}, etc. work without manual edits.
5. Set {{base_url}} (Collection variables tab) to wherever the API is running, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:5000 for `python run.py`.

Requires the DB-backed branch of this API (Flask-SQLAlchemy + MySQL) to be running with migrations applied (`flask db upgrade`).

request.description: Liveness check.
Registers a founder account. Saves the returned id as {{user_id}}.
Registers an investor account, used for thesis/matching endpoints. Saves id as {{investor_user_id}}.
Registers an admin account. Saves id as {{admin_user_id}}. The 'role': 'admin' claim is what unlocks the Admin folder.
Logs in as the founder account and stores {{access_token}} / {{refresh_token}} for every other request in the collection.
Logs in as the admin account and stores {{admin_access_token}} used by the Admin folder.
Stub endpoint, no body required.
Stub endpoint, no body required.
Send the REFRESH token (not access token) as the Bearer token. Rotates {{access_token}} / {{refresh_token}}.
Returns the authenticated user (from the access token).
Merges the given fields into the user's profile.
Completeness score (0-100) based on name/bio/role fields.
Creates a startup. Saves the returned id as {{startup_id}}.
Fetch a startup by id.
Partially updates a startup.
Creates a pitch under a startup. Saves the returned id as {{pitch_id}}.
Optional filters: startup_id, visibility.
Fetch a pitch by id.
Adds a new version to a pitch. Saves the returned id as {{version_id}}.
List all versions of a pitch.
Fetch one version by id.
Returns just the processing status of a version.
Score history across all versions of a pitch.
Queues an async AI evaluation job for a pitch version. Saves the returned id as {{job_id}} / {{evaluation_id}}.
Poll job status. Wait a couple seconds after queueing for status to flip to 'done'.
Returns the completed evaluation for a pitch version. 404 until the job is done.
Manually overrides an evaluation's result.
Creates/updates an investor's thesis. Uses {{investor_user_id}} from the Investor registration as investor_id.
Fetch an investor's thesis by id.
Scores every startup against every stored thesis. Saves the first match id as {{match_id}}.
All matches for a given investor.
All matches for a given startup.
Score breakdown for a specific match.
Returns a user's aggregate reputation score and raw ratings.
Submits a rating (1-5) for a user.
Returns earned badges. 'trusted' once average score >= 4, else 'new'.
Optional filters: expertise, availability. NOTE: there is no POST /mentors endpoint in this API, so this list is empty until mentor rows are seeded directly in the database.
Fetch a mentor by id. Will 404 unless a mentor with this id was seeded directly in the database.
Creates a mentor session booking. Saves the returned id as {{booking_id}}.
Optional filters: user_id, role.
Updates a booking, e.g. status transitions.
Submits feedback for a completed booking.
Creates a deal room for a startup. Saves the returned id as {{room_id}}.
Fetch a deal room by id.
Marks the NDA for this deal room as signed. No body required.
Adds a document to the deal room. Saves the returned id as {{doc_id}}.
Returns the document's download URL and logs an access-log entry.
Lists access-log events for the deal room.
Sends a message between two users.
Optional filters: thread_with, deal_room_id.

Lists notifications for the current authenticated user. NOTE: no route in this API currently calls send_notification(), so this stays empty unless a notification row is seeded directly in the database.
Marks a notification as read. Will 404 unless a notification with this id exists.
Stub endpoint for voice-driven navigation intents.
Stub endpoint for submitting a pitch via voice transcript.
Requires the admin access token (Login (Admin) sets {{admin_access_token}}).
Approves a user's verification. No body required.
Lists all recorded admin audit-log events.
Flags a piece of content for moderation. No body required.
